channel.title: Intro/ Misc on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in Intro/ Misc on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Arms
item.description: Laws Arms act GA. Knives and daggers Blade should be less than 9” long and 2 in wide. The rule states that any person under section 4 of the Arms Act, 1956 read with rules in Arms Rule, 1962 should not by any way acquire, possess, sale and use any arm or firearm whereby such arm is sharp edged and deadly by its very nature such as swords (including sword sticks), Dagger, Bayonets, spears (including lances and javelins), battle-axes, Knives (including Kirpan and khukeris) or any other arms

item.title: Flight
item.description: Microlight Costs : 2008 here. Jakkur parking Rs 200 per day 20,00,000 for own microlight. 3-axis, “X-air Microlights” . 20 lac INR. Training BLR Aerosports here. Rides AN Jakkur here. MFl Jakkur here. Viking Jakkur here. They do Aeromodelling too. Hang gliding License requirements here. Equipment Spirit 16 – Rs. 1,96,900 + lorry packing 5000. Ace Blr. rAjastAn skyventures here. para-gliding Bengaluru Nandi hills Aeromodelling Aerotrix Blr here. Viking Jakkur here.

item.title: OCI
item.description: Notifications Ministry of Home Affairs issued a notification on March 4 dramatically altering the compact between OCIs and the Indian state. This notification, which is issued under Section 7B of the Citizenship Act, 1955, supersedes three earlier notifications issued on April 11, 2005, January 5, 2007, and January 5, 2009, which laid down the rights of the OCIs. Restrictions These restrictions include a requirement for OCIs to secure a special permit to undertake “any research”, to undertake any “missionary” or “Tablighi” or “journalistic activities” or to visit any area in India notified as “protected”, “restricted” or “prohibited”.

item.title: Skiing
item.description: Kullu - manAli http://skiinginmanali.com/ 1 lift Sikkim Phuni Valley in Lachung-Sikkim Yumthang Valley, Sikkim Tawang Auli Source: TW 2520 m - 3049 m (Difference 529 m) Total 3km slopes. Easy 2.5, intermediate .5 Lifts Joshimath-Auli base Gorson Ropeway 4km 9 AM tol 5PM 30 pers INR 1000 per person for up and down. Chair car 800m 8.30 am till 4.30 PM 4 pers. 1 pers backup. INR 500 per person per ride J bar 500m 9 am till 2 PM Charges are 50 to 100 rupees per round.
